Jocelyn is trying to solve the following problem with a ratio table. Fill in the last column of the ratio table to answer the question.

At the corner store, you can buy $1$ granola bar for $\$5$. How much do $8$ granola bars cost?

\begin{tabular}{|c|c|c|c|c|}
\hline
granola bars & 1 & 10 & 2 & \\
\hline
dollars & 5 & 50 & 10 & \\
\hline
\end{tabular}
